sonnapadi aaduven

unndhiram pole naan

un udalil naan oadi

thogai kondu nindraadum

mundhi varum thaenmangi
pandhi vaikkum neram..

unnai oru seipole

kanmayangi thoongavaa

aariraarao nee paada
aasai undu maane
aaru yezhu ketaalum
petreduppen naane

muththiram varum
muththu dinam endru
sithiriam varum
visithiram endru

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses deep feelings of love and the desire for eternal connection, highlighting the importance of companionship.

What is the context of this song in the movie?

In Ejamaan, this song reflects the protagonist's emotional journey and his longing for his beloved.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song features the iconic voices of S.Janaki and S.P.Balasubramaniam, both celebrated artists in Tamil music.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music was composed by the legendary Ilaiyaraaja, known for his innovative and soulful compositions.

When was this song released?

This beautiful melody was released on February 18, 1993.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Oru Naalum Unai Maravatha, the lyrics convey a heartfelt message of love and the desire for an unbreakable bond. The song plays a pivotal role in Ejamaan, showcasing the protagonist's emotional struggles and aspirations. With its soothing melody and powerful vocals, it evokes a sense of nostalgia and longing. The collaboration between the legendary singers and the masterful composition creates an unforgettable listening experience.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Oru Naalum Unai Maravatha is a timeless melody that beautifully encapsulates the essence of love and longing. With the enchanting voices of S.Janaki and S.P.Balasubramaniam, this song from the classic film Ejamaan resonates with deep emotions. The masterful composition by Ilaiyaraaja adds a unique charm, making it a must-listen for any romantic at heart.
stanzaMeanings: One day, you should not be forgotten. The words 'good fortune' should always be spoken, and this is a self-choice ceremony that brings happiness.
One day, you should not be forgotten. This is the blessing I want, a bond that should not be separated from the body and soul.
I need a state that does not fade away like the light from the eyes. Please take care of me, my lord, please take care of me, please take care of me, please take care of me.
One day, you should not be forgotten. This is the blessing I want, a bond that should not be separated from the body and soul.
As you show your hand, I will dance as you say. I will write that I am yours.
Like a shadow, I will run in your presence. I will search for joy in your body.
With the sugarcane, the body rests. When the sweet mango comes, it will be the time to enjoy.
The blessings of the gods, the blessings of the earth, the blessings of the sky, what are the blessings that are lost?
I need a state that does not fade away like the light from the eyes. A beautiful bond, a pure bond, a beautiful bond, a pure bond.
With the bed made of cotton and the cradle tied, the jasmine flower will give birth to that child’s fruit.
Will you stay in my heart like a deed? Will my song of love make you sleep?
Oh, sing, there is a desire to sing. Even if I ask seven times, I will take it myself.
The pearl will come, the pearl will come, and the smile will come as a visitor.
One day, you should not be forgotten. This is the blessing I want, a bond that should not be separated from the body and soul.
I need a state that does not fade away like the light from the eyes. A beautiful bond, a pure bond, please take care of me, please take care of me.
